project.name: Viettel AI Race Smart Chatbot
project.description: Python chatbot pipeline for Viettel AI Race that routes questions between document multiple-choice answering and API configuration generation using retrieval, scoring, template filling, and optional ML models.

edges.description: README documents the main submission runner.
README describes the two-branch pipeline architecture.
Planning notes describe pipeline behavior and scoring experiments.
Runtime dependencies configure the command-line pipeline execution.
Runtime dependencies support retrieval, scoring, and ML components.
Alias dictionary enriches API catalog loading.

layers.name: Entrypoints & Pipeline Core
layers.description: Command-line and single-sample entrypoints plus the central two-branch orchestration and shared schemas.

layers.name: Configuration & Paths
layers.description: Runtime constants, model settings, filesystem paths, dependency manifest, and API alias configuration.

layers.name: API Branch
layers.description: API catalog loading, retrieval, reranking, slot extraction, normalization, template filling, validation, and final API answer generation.

layers.name: Document QA Branch
layers.description: PDF/MinerU parsing, chunking, retrieval, option parsing, option scoring, and document-answer solving.

layers.name: Selector & Preprocessing
layers.description: Question normalization, time expression handling, text cleaning, selector feature building, training, and prediction logic.

layers.name: Model, Output & Utilities
layers.description: Optional embedding/reranking/LLM wrappers plus output formatting, IO, logging, timing, fuzzy matching, and JSON helpers.

layers.name: Data Artifacts
layers.description: Competition spreadsheets and processed JSON/JSONL artifacts consumed by API and document retrieval workflows.

layers.name: Build, Evaluation & Debug Scripts
layers.description: One-off and repeatable scripts for building registries/knowledge bases, training selector models, evaluating locally, and debugging scoring behavior.

layers.name: Documentation & Planning
layers.description: README, implementation plan, and small output notes that describe setup, architecture, expected behavior, and local project history.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and planning notes to understand the competition task, two supported branches, and speed-oriented design constraints.

tour.title: Submission Entrypoints
tour.description: Inspect how batch submission and single-sample execution create input samples, invoke the pipeline, and write predictions.

tour.title: Pipeline Decision Flow
tour.description: Follow the central pipeline from normalized question text through branch selection to document or API solving and prediction schemas.

tour.title: Selector And Preprocessing
tour.description: Review how raw Vietnamese questions are cleaned, normalized, featurized, and classified into call_document or call_api.

tour.title: Document QA Branch
tour.description: Trace document solving through chunk retrieval, option parsing, scoring, and optional knowledge-base building from parsed PDFs.

tour.title: API Configuration Branch
tour.description: Trace API solving through catalog loading, retrieval, reranking, slot extraction, normalization, template filling, and validation.

tour.title: Data Preparation And Evaluation
tour.description: Inspect the scripts and metrics that build processed artifacts, train the selector, evaluate local predictions, and debug retrieval/scoring changes.

tour.title: Shared Support
tour.description: Finish with shared utilities and model wrappers that support retrieval, fuzzy matching, logging, IO, JSON parsing, and optional embedding/reranking/LLM integrations.
